lemaCorto: Artificial intelligence at the service of security
descripcionCorta: We build autonomous defense technology powered by AI: drones, turrets, and intelligent video surveillance systems.
descripcionLarga: AI Robotics is the technology innovation arm of Codeplex. We design and build electronic devices and autonomous systems based on artificial intelligence that don't yet exist on the market — or that exist without the capabilities reality demands: real-time detection of faces, vehicles, objects and weapons; automated drone response; and autonomous defense turrets to protect private property, businesses and municipalities.
